items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, ALB down over 4%
items.snippet: Lithium mining stocks broadly fell. ALB down over 4%, SQM down 3%, SGML down over 2%, LAR down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Citi upgrades ALB to Buy - underappreciated growth opportunities
items.snippet: Citi raised ALB from High Risk to Buy. Target $225. Market underestimates Albemarle growth potential. Lithium shifting to oversupply is low probability given EV and ESS demand. ESS production expected 950 GWh in 2026 (+35% YoY) to 1300 GWh in 2027.

items.headline: ALB Q1 2026: 33% YoY sales increase, 148% EBITDA increase
items.snippet: Strong Q1 results: 33% YoY increase in net sales, 148% increase in adjusted EBITDA. Citi $225 PT implies 50% upside. Consensus: Moderate Buy, mean PT $218.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC Capital Markets: Albemarle likely to continue growing volumes. Cost reductions alongside higher lithium prices drive earnings upside. Lithium supply expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC expects 2026/2027 EBITDA of $2.8B/$2.9B. Reiterated outperform, boosted PT to $257.
